prompt: A heartwarming fictional movie poster in a soft cinematic Japanese drama style, photographed at golden hour with dreamy backlight and gentle lens glow. A person seen from behind and slightly below, wearing a cozy cream knit sweater, lifts a plush penguin toy high toward a bright sunset sky. The plush is centered and fills much of the frame: black fuzzy body, white belly, small yellow beak, yellow feet, outstretched stubby wings, and a humanlike anime-girl face framed by short dark brown bobbed hair with hairpins, creating a cute surreal mascot character. The background is an outdoor field with warm bokeh trees and a glowing sun low on the horizon, all in creamy beige, honey, peach, and gold tones. Several white feathers float through the air; show exactly 5 visible feathers scattered around the composition. Make the mood tender, nostalgic, hopeful, and slightly fantastical, like a family fantasy film poster. Add Japanese poster typography integrated into the design: at the top center, the tagline "この出会いが、世界をやさしく変えていく。"; along the left side vertically, "ずっと、いっしょだよ。"; near the bottom center, a large handwritten glowing title "{argument name="movie title" default="GUGUGAGA"}" in warm white neon-like script with a small pink heart above it; directly below in elegant serif capitals, "{argument name="subtitle" default="THE MOVIE"}". Beneath that, place a pink ribbon banner with the Japanese line "ずっと、いっしょだよ。". At the very bottom, add small centered Japanese credit text in a realistic film-poster layout, including cast and staff lines and production/distribution credits; include "gugugagaTokyo" and "AI Studio Tokyo" on the final line. Use a vertical one-sheet poster composition, polished commercial key art, shallow depth of field, soft filmic contrast, premium cinematic lighting, sentimental fantasy-drama aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 一张温馨的虚构电影海报，采用柔和的日系电影剧照风格，拍摄于黄金时刻，带有梦幻般的逆光和柔和的镜头光晕。画面中，一名穿着舒适米色针织毛衣的人从后方及略低的角度被拍摄，正将一只毛绒企鹅玩具高高举向明亮的夕阳天空。毛绒玩具位于画面中心并占据大部分空间：黑色毛茸茸的身体、白色肚皮、黄色小嘴、黄色脚掌、向外伸展的短小翅膀，以及一张类似动漫少女的人脸，配有短棕色波波头和发卡，营造出一种可爱且超现实的吉祥物形象。背景是户外田野，带有温暖的树木虚化效果和地平线上低垂的耀眼太阳，整体色调为奶油米色、蜂蜜色、桃色和金色。几根白色羽毛在空中飘浮；画面中需清晰可见 5 根羽毛。氛围营造出温柔、怀旧、充满希望且略带奇幻的感觉，如同家庭奇幻电影海报。在设计中融入日文海报排版：顶部中央为宣传语“この出会いが、世界をやさしく変えていく。”；左侧垂直排列“ずっと、いっしょだよ。”；底部中央附近为巨大的手写发光标题“{argument name="movie title" default="GUGUGAGA"}”，采用温暖的白色霓虹灯风格字体，上方带有一个粉色小爱心；下方紧接着优雅的衬线大写字母“{argument name="subtitle" default="THE MOVIE"}”。在此下方，放置一条粉色丝带横幅，上面写有日文“ずっと、いっしょだよ。”。最底部添加居中的小型日文演职员表，采用真实的电影海报布局，包含演员和工作人员名单以及制作/发行信息；最后一行包含“gugugagaTokyo”和“AI Studio Tokyo”。采用垂直单张海报构图，精致的商业主视觉，浅景深，柔和的电影质感对比度，高级电影灯光，感性的奇幻剧情美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 温馨企鹅奇幻电影海报：此提示词可生成一张充满情感的日系风格虚构电影海报，画面主体为夕阳下被举起的毛绒企鹅吉祥物，非常适合用于恶搞电影主视觉图及社交媒体病毒式传播素材。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面
breakdown.whySelected: 得分 91；构图: centered, poster layout, vertical；风格: realistic, cinematic, anime, fantasy, premium, studio；要求精确文字；文字是主视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, poster layout, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, anime, fantasy, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: backlight, neon, golden hour, shallow depth, depth of field, lens]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
